name: NurbsToSVG
description: Converts Grasshopper NURBS curves to SVG <path> elements via linear-segment approximation at a configurable sample count (default 50). Coordinates are transformed from Rhino Y-up to SVG Y-down using the canvas anchor.

inputParameters.name: n
inputParameters.description: NURBS curve or list of curves

inputParameters.name: s
inputParameters.description: Sample count per curve (default 50). Higher = smoother

inputParameters.name: sc
inputParameters.description: Stroke color (CSS string or list). Default: 'none'

inputParameters.name: sw
inputParameters.description: Stroke width or list of stroke widths. Default: 0

inputParameters.name: f
inputParameters.description: Fill color (CSS string or list). Default: 'none'

inputParameters.name: canvas
inputParameters.description: Rectangle defining the SVG canvas (optional; uses bounding box if not provided)

outputParameters.name: svg_code
outputParameters.description: SVG element string(s) for each curve
